name: Ruins of Boon Lay
descriptions: Ground zero of the apocalypse. Radiation storms sweep between collapsed HDB blocks and abandoned factories. Nobody intends to stay here.

name: Lakeside
descriptions: Dense forests surround an overgrown reservoir. Fresh water remains abundant, but decades of fallout still poison the region.

name: Ruins of the Science Museum
descriptions: Research exhibits, laboratories and archives lie buried beneath rubble. Knowledge survives here, but so do dangerous experiments.

name: Jurong East Shopping Centre Ruins
descriptions: The last great refugee hub. Survivors crowd the interconnected malls and transport networks despite the harsh conditions.

name: Chua Chu Kang Military Base
descriptions: Fortified compounds and sealed armouries offer protection from the wastes. It is dangerous, but finally survivable.

name: Clementi Forest District
descriptions: Nature has reclaimed entire neighbourhoods. Thick vegetation shields the district from the worst of the apocalypse.

name: Dover Hospital
descriptions: A sprawling medical enclave maintained by generations of survivors. One of the few places where settlement feels realistic.

comment: 7 — Mass Rapid Transit Station, +temperature radiation (good temp & rad), -unity
name: Mass Rapid Transit Station
descriptions: Underground tunnels shield you from the surface fallout. Scavengers trade safety for cramped, lightless living.

name: MacRitchie
descriptions: The reservoir park has become a tangled jungle. Fresh water and rich soil are easy to find, but the old world's poisons linger.

name: Mandai Park Ruins
descriptions: Crumbled enclosures and overgrown trails mark what was once a wildlife park. Nature and decay coexist in equal measure.
